meaning: n.閲戝睘闄剁摲,鍚櫠鍚堥噾
examples: The technology and property of nanometer cermet is studied with new microwave sintering technology.
Oxidation and diffusion wears accelerated failing progress of cermet cutters at higher cutting speeds.
The test and analysis for wear of cermet cutter during high-speed dry cutting 45 steel are carried out.
